use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in landing pages
Interactive button with expanding fill animation on hover
Navigation trigger buttons with directional arrow icon
Form submission buttons with visual feedback
Hero section CTA buttons with animated hover states
ai_summary: An animated button component featuring an expanding circular fill effect triggered on hover. The button displays a directional arrow icon that shifts position and text that changes color during the hover interaction. Built with Tailwind CSS using group-hover states for smooth 500ms transitions, supporting customizable labels and optional styling classes.
